requirement_topic.en: EMC Testing to GSO / ETSI Standards (CITRA Type Approval)

summary.en: Kuwait adopts GSO (Gulf Standardisation Organisation) technical regulations for electromagnetic compatibility (EMC). EMC test reports to GSO-adopted standards — aligned to the ETSI EN 301 489 series for radio equipment — must be submitted as part of the CITRA type approval application. Tests cover radiated and conducted emissions and immunity for the frequency bands in use (2.4 GHz WLAN/BT, 5 GHz WLAN, SRD/LoRa, cellular). Test reports must be issued by a CITRA-accredited laboratory. GB/T 9254 (China CISPR 22/32 equivalent) and GB 17625 (China IEC 61000-3-2/3-3 equivalent) are not accepted as direct substitutes; retesting to GSO/ETSI test plans may be required.
summary.zh: 科威特采用GSO（海湾标准化组织）技术法规进行电磁兼容（EMC）要求。对齐ETSI EN 301 489系列无线设备标准的GSO采纳标准EMC测试报告须作为CITRA型号认证申请的一部分提交。测试涵盖所用频段（2.4 GHz WLAN/BT、5 GHz WLAN、SRD/LoRa、蜂窝）的辐射和传导发射及抗扰度。测试报告须由CITRA认可实验室出具。GB/T 9254（中国CISPR 22/32等效标准）和GB 17625（中国IEC 61000-3-2/3-3等效标准）不可作为直接替代；可能需要按GSO/ETSI测试方案重新测试。
summary.zht: 科威特採用GSO（海灣標準化組織）技術法規進行電磁相容性（EMC）要求。對齊ETSI EN 301 489系列無線設備標準的GSO採納標準EMC測試報告須作為CITRA型號認證申請的一部分提交。測試涵蓋所用頻段（2.4 GHz WLAN/BT、5 GHz WLAN、SRD/LoRa、蜂窩）的輻射和傳導發射及抗擾度。測試報告須由CITRA認可實驗室出具。GB/T 9254（中國CISPR 22/32等效標準）和GB 17625（中國IEC 61000-3-2/3-3等效標準）不可作為直接替代；可能需要按GSO/ETSI測試方案重新測試。

standards_or_laws: GSO Technical Regulation for Telecom and Radio Equipment — EMC (GCC member states)
ETSI EN 301 489-1 v2.2.3 (Common EMC requirements for radio equipment)
CISPR 32 / IEC 61000-3-2 / IEC 61000-3-3 (as adopted by GSO)

summary.en: China EMC testing uses GB/T 9254 (equivalent to CISPR 22/32) for emissions and GB/T 17618 (equivalent to CISPR 24) for immunity of IT equipment. Radio equipment EMC is tested as part of SRRC type approval and CCC. Separate GB standards apply for conducted disturbances (GB 17625 series, equivalent to IEC 61000-3-x).
summary.zh: 中国EMC测试采用GB/T 9254（等效CISPR 22/32）进行IT设备发射测试，GB/T 17618（等效CISPR 24）进行抗扰度测试。无线设备EMC作为SRRC型号认证和CCC的一部分进行测试。传导干扰适用单独的GB标准（GB 17625系列，等效IEC 61000-3-x）。
summary.zht: 中國EMC測試採用GB/T 9254（等效CISPR 22/32）進行IT設備發射測試，GB/T 17618（等效CISPR 24）進行抗擾度測試。無線設備EMC作為SRRC型號認證和CCC的一部分進行測試。傳導干擾適用單獨的GB標準（GB 17625系列，等效IEC 61000-3-x）。

gap.en: China GB EMC test reports alone are not accepted by CITRA. GSO/ETSI-aligned test reports from a CITRA-accredited laboratory are required. Where existing ETSI EN 301 489 test data is available (e.g., from a prior EU CE marking exercise), CITRA may accept those reports if the laboratory is CITRA-accredited or mutually recognised; confirm with CITRA before relying on existing test data.
gap.zh: 仅凭中国GB EMC测试报告不被CITRA接受。需提供来自CITRA认可实验室的GSO/ETSI对齐测试报告。若已有现有的ETSI EN 301 489测试数据（例如来自之前欧盟CE认证工作），且实验室获CITRA认可或相互承认，CITRA可能接受这些报告；依赖现有测试数据前请向CITRA确认。
gap.zht: 僅憑中國GB EMC測試報告不被CITRA接受。需提供來自CITRA認可實驗室的GSO/ETSI對齊測試報告。若已有現有的ETSI EN 301 489測試數據（例如來自之前歐盟CE認證工作），且實驗室獲CITRA認可或相互承認，CITRA可能接受這些報告；依賴現有測試數據前請向CITRA確認。

source.publisher: CITRA — Communications and Information Technology Regulatory Authority of Kuwait; GSO (Gulf Standardisation Organisation)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC testing to GSO/ETSI standards from a CITRA-accredited laboratory is mandatory as part of the CITRA type approval process. Chinese GB EMC test reports are not accepted as substitutes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 来自CITRA认可实验室的GSO/ETSI标准EMC测试是CITRA型号认证过程的强制要求。中国GB EMC测试报告不可作为替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 來自CITRA認可實驗室的GSO/ETSI標準EMC測試是CITRA型號認證過程的強制要求。中國GB EMC測試報告不可作為替代。

requirement_topic.en: GSO GMARK Product Conformity for Consumer Electronics
requirement_topic.zh: 消费电子产品GSO GMARK产品合规
requirement_topic.zht: 消費電子產品GSO GMARK產品合規

summary.en: Kuwait, as a GCC member state, adopts GSO (Gulf Standardisation Organisation) technical regulations that may mandate the GMARK (Gulf Mark of Conformity) for regulated consumer electronics and electrical product categories. The GMARK indicates conformity to applicable GSO technical regulations covering EMC and, for in-scope categories, product safety. Wireless and IoT devices falling within GSO-regulated consumer electronics categories must obtain GMARK certification from a GSO-authorised certification body before import or sale. The GMARK is separate from and complementary to the CITRA radio type approval — both may be required simultaneously depending on product category.
summary.zh: 科威特作为GCC成员国，采用GSO（海湾标准化组织）技术法规，可能对受监管消费类电子和电气产品类别强制要求GMARK（海湾合规标志）。GMARK表示符合适用的GSO技术法规，涵盖EMC，以及列入范围类别的产品安全。属于GSO受监管消费类电子类别的无线和物联网设备须在进口或销售前从GSO授权认证机构取得GMARK认证。GMARK与CITRA无线电型号认证相互独立且互补——根据产品类别，两者可能同时被要求。
summary.zht: 科威特作為GCC成員國，採用GSO（海灣標準化組織）技術法規，可能對受監管消費類電子和電氣產品類別強制要求GMARK（海灣合規標誌）。GMARK表示符合適用的GSO技術法規，涵蓋EMC，以及列入範圍類別的產品安全。屬於GSO受監管消費類電子類別的無線和物聯網裝置須在進口或銷售前從GSO授權認證機構取得GMARK認證。GMARK與CITRA無線電型號認證相互獨立且互補——根據產品類別，兩者可能同時被要求。

standards_or_laws: GSO Technical Regulation for Consumer Electronics (GCC member states)
GSO GMARK Scheme — Gulf Mark of Conformity
GSO Technical Regulation for Telecom Terminal Equipment
GSO IEC 62368-1 (audio/video, IT and communication technology equipment safety)

summary.en: In China, the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) mark serves a similar function for in-scope consumer electronics categories, covering electrical safety and EMC. Products outside the CCC catalogue may not require a mandatory conformity mark beyond SRRC and NAL approvals.
summary.zh: 在中国，CCC（中国强制认证）标志对列入范围的消费类电子产品类别具有类似作用，涵盖电气安全和EMC。CCC目录之外的产品除SRRC和NAL批准外可能不需要强制合规标志。
summary.zht: 在中國，CCC（中國強制認證）標誌對列入範圍的消費類電子產品類別具有類似作用，涵蓋電氣安全和EMC。CCC目錄之外的產品除SRRC和NAL批准外可能不需要強制合規標誌。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — GB 4943.1 safety, GB/T 9254 EMC

gap.en: CCC certification and the CCC mark are not recognised in Kuwait. Wireless or IoT devices in GSO-regulated consumer electronics categories must obtain GMARK certification from a GSO-authorised certification body in addition to CITRA type approval. Confirm whether the specific product category is covered by a mandatory GSO technical regulation with a qualified regulatory professional.
gap.zh: CCC认证和CCC标志在科威特不被承认。属于GSO受监管消费类电子类别的无线或物联网设备须除CITRA型号认证外，从GSO授权认证机构获得GMARK认证。请与合格监管专业人士确认特定产品类别是否受强制性GSO技术法规覆盖。
gap.zht: CCC認證和CCC標誌在科威特不被承認。屬於GSO受監管消費類電子類別的無線或物聯網裝置須除CITRA型號認證外，從GSO授權認證機構獲得GMARK認證。請與合格監管專業人士確認特定產品類別是否受強制性GSO技術法規涵蓋。

source.publisher: GSO — Gulf Standardisation Organisation (هيئة التقييس لدول مجلس التعاون الخليجي)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GMARK certification may be mandatory for wireless and IoT devices in GSO-regulated consumer electronics categories sold in Kuwait. CCC is not accepted as a substitute. Confirm product category scope with a qualified regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GMARK认证对于在科威特销售的GSO受监管消费类电子类别的无线和物联网设备可能为强制要求。CCC不可作为替代。请与合格监管专业人士确认产品类别范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GMARK認證對於在科威特銷售的GSO受監管消費類電子類別的無線和物聯網裝置可能為強制要求。CCC不可作為替代。請與合格監管專業人士確認產品類別範圍。
